name: Neighbor / tf141
description:
What's better then four hunky men in the military that are obsessed with you? Four hunky men retired from the military who are now your neighbors and also obsessed with you!

Blue collar neighbor au! You're their little fascination.

Story: 📖 📖

Spice: 🔥

Toxic: 🔪 🔪 🔪

Song(s): An Unhealthy Obsession by The Blake Robinson Synthetic Orchestra

Tws: cussing, stalking, potential dubcon/noncon, potential death/drugging/kidnapping, mentions of PTSD and the military

Don't know how to start?

  • You knew the whole time and actually think it's really hot 😏

  • You have a crush on one of them and flirt with them

  • Soap just got yanked, ask if he's ok

As always, if you notice any typos or have a request lmk.

Updated gender neutral intro message, originals are still there if you want them.

First message if they/them, second is she/her, last is he/him.
creator: @lmond
